Interface ITerrainBlockCursor

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.GeoDatabaseExtensions

ESRI.Server.GeoDatabaseExtensions.dll

Provides access to TerrainBlockCursor object.

[Guid("3F4FE9AD-471B-4D67-8F8F-930A23A60305")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface ITerrainBlockCursor

Properties

BlockCount

The number of blocks in the cursor.

int BlockCount { get; }

Property Value

int

Methods

Next(out int, out int, out int, out int, out bool)

Returns next block in the form of rows and columns.

pRowBegin int
pRowEnd int
pColBegin int
pColEnd int
pbIsEnd bool

Reset()

Resets the cursor to point to the first block.
